prompt: Quick check: Argument: "Late-shift commute complaints fell by 22% after extending evening bus service. So the action caused the change." What is the logical gap?

Ignore the evidence because no single item can matter at all.
Become completely certain the action works in every setting.

explanation: Change your confidence in proportion to how strong and limited the evidence is.
